sections.kind: Added — Belmawa / PDDIKTI student upload xlsx (Scribd)
items: `scripts/parse_belmawa.py` — Parse Belmawa upload roster: `nmmhsmsmh`, `nimhsmsmh`, `nik`, `npwp`, `telpomsmh`, `emailmsmh`, `tahun_lulus`, kode PT/prodi, provinsi/kabupaten; dedup by NIK then NIM; education fact for tahun lulus.
`scripts/process_belmawa.py` — document + BatchProcessor runner (`data_akademik` template).
`templates/data_akademik.json` — Classify keywords (`belmawa`, `pddikti`, `nimhsmsmh`); notes for Belmawa parser routing.

sections.kind: Processed — Scribd 755903156 (Belmawa upload)

sections.kind: Added — ExportMstAnggota DTKS/BDT social-registry xlsx (Scribd)

`scripts/process_mst_anggota_dtks.py` — document + BatchProcessor runner.
`templates/mst_anggota_dtks.json` — Classify keywords (`exportmstanggota`, `id bdt`, `id keluarga dtks`); skip OCR for xlsx.

sections.kind: Added — IBI member roster xlsx (Scribd multi-sheet)

`scripts/process_data_anggota_ibi.py` — document + BatchProcessor runner.
`templates/data_anggota_ibi.json` — Classify keywords; skip OCR for xlsx.

sections.kind: Processed — Scribd 458784697 (DATA ANGGOTA BARU)
items: 1,768 persons — IBI Kota Pekanbaru, 44 ranting sheets. Doc `01KSD82FV5GZVMB5GNRS3B4AEM`.

sections.kind: Added — Lembar Penyerahan Formulir LHKPN (KPK submission receipt)
items: `scripts/parse_lhkpn_penyerahan.py` — Parse Atas Nama / Jabatan / Bidang / Lembaga / tahun pelaporan from KPK e-LHKPN delivery slip text.
`scripts/process_lhkpn_penyerahan.py` — document + BatchProcessor (minimal person: employment facts, no NIK/photo).
`templates/lhkpn.json` — Notes routing for ikhtisar vs penyerahan parsers.

sections.kind: Processed — Jateng Pusdataru Tanda Terima LHKPN 2019
items: 1 person — Lembar Penyerahan (not Ikhtisar). Doc `01KSD7METBD07Z36ZY401CDBJB`. Kepala Bidang Penataan Ruang, Pemprov Jateng, pelaporan 2019.

sections.kind: Added — Buku Telepon Artis (Scribd text directory)
items: `scripts/parse_buku_telepon.py` — Parse celebrity phone-book layout: `Nama : tel1, tel2`, wrapped lines, sub-contacts `(Nama, peran) : tel`. Landlines (5–7 digit) → extra; mobile → phone edges.
`scripts/process_buku_telepon.py` — document + BatchProcessor + phone/document edges.
`templates/buku_telepon.json` — Classify keywords; parser/processor routing.
`scripts/pipeline_routes.py` — Orphan hint for `parse_buku_telepon`.

sections.kind: Processed — Scribd 37219610 (Buku Telepon Artis)
items: 1,916 persons — 1,909 created, 8 updated via phone dedup. Doc `01KSD6WNH2N9M8ZH5J4G9N187W`. Scribd PDF download blocked (captcha); processed from `download_scribd_text` / pre-fetched `.txt`.

sections.kind: Added — Singowangi population roster format support (data_induk_desa)
items: `scripts/parse_data_induk_desa.py` — Auto-detect Marawali vs Singowangi format. Singowangi: sheet "Sheet1", title row "PENDUDUK <DESA>", data starts at row 2 with fixed column mapping (NIK, KK, nama, gender, marital, POB, DOB, religion, family status, education, occupation, address, parents, kecamatan, desa).
`scripts/process_data_induk_desa.py` — Made generic: reads title/description/sheet from meta in parsed JSON instead of hardcoded Marawali values.
`templates/data_induk_desa.json` — Updated notes to mention Singowangi format auto-detection.

sections.kind: Workflow — skip download when file already provided
items: `next_manual.txt` — Step 3 now explicitly says: if file already exists in `tmp/` (provided by user), skip download and proceed to step 4.

sections.kind: Processed — PENDUDUK SINGOWANGI SEPTEMBER 2021
items: Scribd xlsx — Population roster Desa Singowangi, Kecamatan Kutorejo, Mojokerto. 3,487 persons with NIK, KK, family relations, education, occupation, address.
Doc `01KSD6Y5F3EGGBFP7982V9H9BS` (backfilled facts).
3,487 persons: All with NIK, KK linkage, gender, marital status, POB, DOB, religion, family role, education, occupation.
OSINT: N/A (no phone/email columns in roster).

sections.kind: Added — Monex Investindo Futures nasabah xlsx (Scribd mis-titled "Data Indonesia")
items: `scripts/parse_nasabah_monex.py` — Multi-sheet branch roster (AC, nasabah, telepon, email, no identitas). Header auto-detect with optional sub-header row; dedup by name+phone+email+AC.
`scripts/process_nasabah_monex.py` — document + BatchProcessor + phone/email/document edges.
`templates/data_nasabah_monex.json` — Classify keywords for Monex/futures; skip OCR for xlsx.
`scripts/pipeline_routes.py` — Orphan hint for `parse_nasabah_monex`.

sections.kind: Processed — Scribd 802454668 (Data Indonesia slug)
items: 9,443 persons — 9,397 phones, 1,006 emails across 19 branch sheets. Doc `01KSD6M6HY1AC44VYG3KZTXF04`. Source title on Scribd misleading; content is PT Monex Investindo Futures customer database.

sections.kind: Added — student roster processor (SD/SMP/SMA xlsx with parent columns)
items: `scripts/process_student_roster.py` — BatchProcessor-based process script for student roster XLSX from Scribd. Handles multi-sheet files with NISN, NIK, KK, DOB, phone, parent info. Parents stored as extra fields (not separate persons).
`templates/data_akademik.json` — Added `parser`/`processor` fields pointing to `process_student_roster.py`.

sections.kind: Processed — Data Daftar Ulang Peserta Didik Baru SD Negeri Lempeh TP 2025-2026
items: Scribd xlsx — `905629927-Data-Daftar-Ulang-Peserta-Didik-Baru-Sd-Negeri-Lempeh-Tp-2025-2026` from `ppid.sarolangunkab.go.id` (mirrored via Scribd). 8 active sheets (kelas 1A–5), 221 students.
221 persons: Students with NIK (204), NISN (191), phone (211), DOB (212), gender, religion, address, parent names/occupations/education.
Doc `01KSD5B638WDNR27R1W6WC38PP`.
OSINT: 211 phones, 0 emails. 1 phone scanned (test), remaining skipped (minors' data).

sections.kind: Added — student roster xlsx parser (ad-hoc, not a permanent script)
items: Used inline Python (not a dedicated `parse_*.py`) to extract 221 student records from multi-sheet xlsx. Handles Google Form formula cells via `data_only=True`, variable header rows (row 1–3), datetime DOB normalization.

sections.kind: Processed — Ikhtisar LHKPN SABKI (Pemkab Sarolangun)
items: `tmp/wCp3MdBlWc3iAGaIu2M81mdn4e7hKy9y5uRRExaQ.pdf` — LHKPN a.n. SABKI (Kasi PMD Kec. Mandiangin Timur). OCR via pdftotext, template `lhkpn`.
4 persons: SABKI + AHWANI (istri) + IMAM SYAH RENDY KURNIAWAN + AFRIZA SARAH KURNIATY (anak). NIK, NPWP, KK, phone, email, assets, family, employment.
Doc `01KSD4N4GRWNVB6M5NVD1PKR3W`.

sections.kind: Added — script-backed parser routing (stop AGENT.md growth)
items: `scripts/pipeline_routes.py` — Resolves template → `parse_*.py` / `process_*.py` from `templates/*.json` and on-disk scripts. CLI: `show`, `list`, `script`, `scripts`.
`AGENT.md` — Removed `## Critical Context` scratchpad; added Parser routing + maintenance rules (no per-template append).
`next_manual.txt` — Step 8 uses `pipeline_routes.py` instead of a growing parser bullet list; step 18 limits AGENT.md edits to generic rules.
`templates/_schema.json` — Documents optional `parser` / `processor` / `notes` fields for route discovery.

sections.kind: Added — Data Portofolio Kredit BPR (Scribd xlsx, 6-sheet loan book)
items: `scripts/parse_portofolio_bpr.py` — Parses BPR loan portfolio xlsx with 6 collection-status sheets (Lancar, 1-30, 31-60, 61-90, NPL, WO). Header-row auto-detection handles WO sheet with title row. Column mapping by header name (case-insensitive). Name-only dedup across sheets.
`scripts/process_portofolio_bpr.py` — document + BatchProcessor + bidirectional edges.
Template `data_portofolio_bpr` — financial extras: No Rekening, Plafond, Outstanding, Angsuran, Bunga, Denda, DPD, Kolektibilitas, Unit, Wilayah.
Diproses: Scribd `795753039/DATA-BASE-ON-FEBRUARI-2024` — 1,918 persons. Doc `01KSD43VKBATC584NK0MEZQZBY`. OSINT N/A (no emails/phones).

sections.kind: Added — Ass Ssik nasabah/kartu kredit xlsx (Scribd)
items: `scripts/parse_ass_ssik.py` — Sheet1 biodata; Sheet2 kartu+HP by nama; Sheet3 kartu; dedup by normalized name; kartu 15–19 digit (exclude `08`/`628` phone patterns).
`scripts/process_ass_ssik.py` — document + BatchProcessor + bidirectional edges.
Template `data_ass_ssik`
Diproses: Scribd `939234375/Ass-Ssik` — 984 persons (983 created, 1 updated). Doc `01KSD3NTCR4T5C7DE20DQVXP5Z`. OSINT skipped (~974 phones — batch terpisah).

sections.kind: Added — PRB Pasif (BPJS patient roster) template + parser
items: New template `daftar_prb_pasif` for BPJS PRB patient rosters (`scripts/parse_prb_pasif.py` + `scripts/process_prb_pasif.py`).
Processed Scribd XLSX `433838660-PRB-Pasif-Semarang-Cek-Riwayat-xlsx`: 18,267 persons (Daftar PRB Pasif Semarang — BPJS chronic disease patients). Doc `01KSD3E6FES4FKSTEP44N1QSNQ`.
2,517 unique phones, 921 unique emails extracted.
Email validation added to process script — XLSX data may contain malformed emails (empty local part, `@`, invalid domains like `@gmail,com`).

sections.kind: Fixed — email edge validation in process scripts
items: `process_prb_pasif.py`: added regex email validation before creating email edges to prevent `Empty local part` / `Invalid domain` validation errors.
Backfilled 63 persons with invalid email edges from this document.

sections.kind: Fixed — Validator false positive on Bugis/Makassar names
items: Validator "Contains address" heuristic flags names ending with "DG JALAN" (Daeng Jalan) as row contamination. This is a known Bugis naming pattern — no fix applied yet; logged for validator tuning.

sections.kind: Added — BPR Debitur xlsx parser (data nasabah BPR Tabris, Scribd)
